Container.Name: household-dashboard
Container.Overview: Wall-mounted household grocery dashboard. Tap products to add them to your shopping list (Apple Reminders or Google Tasks). Curate your product list by searching the Open Food Facts catalogue — no API key required. Designed for an iPad mounted on the wall, running on your local network.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port the dashboard is accessible on. Open this in your browser after starting.

Config.Name: Data Directory
Config.Description: Where the SQLite database, backups, and auto-generated secrets are stored. Must be persistent across restarts.

Config.Name: Setup Password
Config.Description: Your dashboard password. Set this on first start — the container hashes it automatically and saves the hash. You can clear this variable after the first successful start.

Config.Name: Session Secret
Config.Description: Secret used to sign login tokens. Leave blank — a strong secret is auto-generated and persisted on first start.

Config.Name: List Provider
Config.Description: Where to send shopping list items. Options: apple_reminders (iOS Shortcuts) | google_tasks

Config.Name: Apple Shortcuts Name
Config.Description: Exact name of your iOS Shortcut. Required when List Provider is apple_reminders.

Config.Name: Google Client ID
Config.Description: OAuth2 Client ID. Required when List Provider is google_tasks.

Config.Name: Google Client Secret
Config.Description: OAuth2 Client Secret. Required when List Provider is google_tasks.

Config.Name: Google Refresh Token
Config.Description: OAuth2 Refresh Token. Required when List Provider is google_tasks.

Config.Name: Google Task List ID
Config.Description: ID of the Google Tasks list to add items to. Required when List Provider is google_tasks.

Config.Name: Open Food Facts Email
Config.Description: Your email address, included in the User-Agent sent to Open Food Facts. Optional but appreciated by the project.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Log verbosity: debug | info | warn | error

Config.Name: Session Expiry (hours)
Config.Description: How long a login session lasts before requiring re-authentication.
